strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including experience building microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq.
Demonstrated architectural capability through founding and building the event-driven, open-source GISCollective platform.
concerns: Completely lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership and executive experience, having only held individual contributor (Senior/Staff) roles.
No evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, developing senior leadership layers, or managing outsourced engineering governance.
Missing required production experience running multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes, regulated financial applications like real-time credit risk and algorithmic working-capital.
response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with solid hands-on experience in distributed systems and recent exposure to AI developer tooling, he fundamentally lacks the executive profile required for this CTO role. The position explicitly demands a leader who has scaled teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, managed managers, and governed external partners, whereas Bogdan's entire career consists of individual contributor roles. Furthermore, he lacks the required production experience operating autonomous, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes fintech infrastructure, making him critically under-qualified for this executive scale-up position.
